//: Copy to ~/.config/prompt-improver/settings.json or .prompt-improver/settings.json. Keys starting with // are comments only (ignored). Full guides: docs/CUSTOM-BACKENDS.md, references/models-supported.md (in the skill).
//backend: auto = use host CLI (Claude session→claude, Grok→grok, …). Or force: claude | grok | gemini | codex | cline | opencode | kimi | kiro. Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_BACKEND. Hint host with PROMPT_IMPROVER_HOST.
//model: Force one model (null = host backend's default_models entry). Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_MODEL. Per-prompt model:<id> wins and may cross-route (model:gpt-5.5→codex).
//default_models: Per-backend generator defaults when model is null. Use null for a backend to leave the CLI default. Unknown future IDs pass through.
//max_tokens: Soft cap passed through where backends support it (best-effort).
//fallback_strategy: When headless generation fails: manual = print assembled materials; error = exit non-zero.
//preferred_backends: Order to try OTHER generators only after the primary (host/model) hits rate limits — not used for the default pick.
//custom_command: Escape hatch for any non-built-in CLI (Kilo, wrappers, curl, …). Prompt is fed on stdin; improved text must be printed on stdout. Bypasses backend/model/cascade resolution. Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_CUSTOM_COMMAND. Set null to use built-in backends. See docs/CUSTOM-BACKENDS.md.
//notes: Free-form notes for humans; not used by the runtime.
notes: Default pick: host CLI + that CLI's default_models (not first-on-PATH). model: routes by family. No supported host generator → HOST_BOUNCE:NO_HEADLESS. Limit cascades then other preferred_backends.
